name: In Lausanne: Bus tour to Interlaken with Harder Kulm
description: Discover In Lausanne: Bus tour to Interlaken with Harder Kulm in Switzerland.
longDescription: Discover In Lausanne: Bus tour to Interlaken with Harder Kulm in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Day trips
subcategory.description: Find and book a day trip by bus through beautiful Swiss landscapes. Get on and let's go. You don't have to worry about any tedious organization on a day trip and can instead enjoy the ride to the fullest while being chauffeured to your excursion destination. Switzerland's well-developed road network allows excursions to all popular places and natural beauties

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online

gallery.alternativeText: Harder Kulm: Enjoy the view of Lake Brienz and the surrounding mountains on your day tour.
Harder Kulm: View of the landscape, mountain lake and clouds, ideal for day trips in the summer.
Interlaken: impressive view of the mountains and the lake on a day trip from Lausanne.
Interlaken: picturesque mountain landscape and idyllic village in Switzerland.
Lausanne: impressive city view with lake, mountains, and historical buildings.
